title: K'lial Khzrry
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:KlialKhzrry-CRO.jpg]] |name=K'lial Khzrry |homeworld= |birth=c. [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]]''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' |death= |species=[[Xi'Dec/Legends|Xi'Dec]] |gender= |pronouns=It/its |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Well, my spouse and I are searching the galaxy looking for beings of high genetic potential to add to our tragically deficient family unit.''"
"''Spouse? That thing's not even the same species!''"
"''Indeed, we are both proud members of the Xi'Dec species and we greatly object to any implications otherwise, thank you very much. Do not disregard our collective identity simply because your species lacks genetic diversity.|K'lial Khzrry and a TGM guard, regarding Diskio Khzrry as the former confuses the latter|}} '''K'lial Khzrry''' was a [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]] of the [[Xi'Dec/Legends|Xi'Dec]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. K'lial and [[Diskio Khzrry]] were the only survivors of the [[Khzrry family unit]], which was once well respected in the Xi'Dec community. K'lial was a well known con artist who often worked for [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] retrieving captive [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] personnel. ==Biography== {{Quote|On many occasions, K'lial and Diskio are assigned as backup on operations where there is a significant chance that an operative will be apprehended by local authorities.|Airen Cracken|}} K'lial Khzzry was one of the last surviving members of the [[Khzrry family unit]]. The rest of the family unit was vacationing onboard the ''[[Savage Pleasure]]'' when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attempted to assassinate [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Mael Sidras]]. Everyone onboard was killed and K'lial and [[Diskio Khzrry|Diskio]] shifted their allegiances to support the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Using their unusual [[Species/Legends|species]] as a cover, the two [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]] would retrieve captured Rebel operatives who had been apprehended by local authorities. They would usually accomplish this through a combination of stubbornness, speed, and K'lial's smooth and pacifying voice. When this was not sufficient they would rely on Diskio's ability to deactivate and disable all sorts of security measures. When Rebel agent [[Basal Moor]] was captured by [[TransGalMeg Industries, Incorporated]] guards on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pako Ramoon]], K'lial was able to approach and confuse the guards with a tirade about wanting to use Moor's genetic material as integration into the Khzzry family unit. While the guards were distracted, K'lial removed the codekeys for Moor's restraints from the pocket of the head security guard. When the guards protested K'lial became very indignant while he secretly unlocked Moor's restraints. When the guards then tried to arrest them for interferring with their prisoner, Diskio used a hidden remote to cause their [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] to crash through the lobby entrance and all three Rebel operatives were able to make their escape. ==Personality and traits== K'lial was a member of the [[Xi'Dec/Legends|Xi'Dec]] species and was more sociable of the two due to being more [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] in appearance. When attempting to free a Rebel agent it was very stubborn and insistent on getting its way, quickly dominating any conversation and ignoring questions and comments from others. It would march in, take command of the situation and escape before anyone else had a moment to think about what had just happened. When local authorities would try and stop it, it would get highly indignant protesting loudly that it was being a victim of xenophobia. ==Skills and abilities== A decently skilled [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]], K'lial was able to talk fast and use its hypnotic voice to help keep local authorities off balance as the two Xi'Dec operatives would sweep Rebels right out of the Empire's grasp. K'lial was also decently talented at pickpocketing which it used to lift keycards and security passes during their extraction operations. ==Equipment== All Khzrry would carry with it were two [[Medpac/Legends|medpacs]]. ==Behind the scenes== K'lial Khzrry was designed by [[Chuck Truett]] for ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]]. He was illustrated by [[Doug Shuler]]. ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Khzrry, K'lial}} [[Category:Alliance Intelligence members]] [[Category:Con artists]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with it/its pronouns]] [[Category:Xi'Dec]]
